violations.text: Food items prepared in the establishment were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (Ice Machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Contents of ice machine were voluntarily disposed of. Ice machine is to be cleaned and sanitized. Establishment is to send photo of cleaned and sanitized machine to DOH before resuming use. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025

Prepared food items made in advance were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025
The urinal in the men's restroom was observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2025
Tile flooring in the kitchen was observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/05/2025
The hood system was observed with food debris. Hood system must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2025
Establishment has a SERV Safe certification must need to be registered with RIDOH office of food protection. FMC certificate expired. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024
Observed newspaper used as an absorbed paper for deep fried samosas at the walk-in cooler. All paper was removed, and samosas will re-fried. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024

Cook food items were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024
